ProjectInfo.ProjectName: FleetGuard AI – AI-Powered Vehicle Inspection and Fleet Management System

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Register Button

TestSteps.Step: 1. Click the 'Register' button on the landing page.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should be directed to the Register page.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Default State of Input Fields

TestSteps.Step: 2. Observe the Name, Email, and Password fields.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: All fields should be empty by default.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Input Field Placeholders

TestSteps.Step: 2. Check if the placeholders disappear when typing.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Placeholders should be visible initially but disappear when the user starts typing.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Sign Up with Valid Credentials

TestSteps.Step: 3. Enter a password meeting requirements (min 8 chars, uppercase, number, symbol).

TestCase.TestData: Full name, Valid Email, Valid Password
TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should be registered successfully and navigated to the driver dashboard.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Sign Up with Invalid Credentials

TestSteps.Step: 2. Enter an invalid email (e.g. missing @ symbol).

TestCase.TestData: Full name, Invalid Email, Invalid Password
TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should receive an error message: 'Please enter a valid email address.'

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Error Message for Missing Fields
TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should receive an error message prompting them to fill in all required fields.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Duplicate Email Registration

TestSteps.Step: 2. Enter an email address already registered in the system.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: System returns HTTP 409 Conflict. Error message: 'Email address already registered.'

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Login Button
TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should be directed to the login page successfully.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Default State of Input Fields

TestSteps.Step: 2. Observe the Email and Password fields.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Both fields should be empty by default.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Input Field Placeholders

TestSteps.Step: 2. Check if placeholders 'Email' and 'Password' disappear when typing.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Placeholders should be visible initially but disappear when the user starts typing.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Logging in with Valid Credentials

TestSteps.Step: 1. Enter a valid registered email address.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should log in successfully and be redirected to their role dashboard (driver or manager).

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Logging in with Invalid Credentials
TestCase.ExpectedResult: System returns HTTP 401. Error message: 'Invalid credentials.'

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Error Message for Missing Fields
TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should receive an error message prompting them to enter the required fields.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Forgot Password Link

TestSteps.Step: 1. Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should be redirected to the Forgot Password page.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify JWT Token Issued on Successful Login
TestCase.ExpectedResult: A JWT token should be stored in localStorage after successful login.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Forgot Password Navigation

TestSteps.Step: 1. Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: User should be redirected to the Forgot Password page.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Reset Email Sent for Registered Email

TestSteps.Step: 1. Enter a registered email address in the Forgot Password field.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Success message: 'Password reset email sent.' Email received with reset link.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Reset Email Not Sent for Unregistered Email

TestSteps.Step: 1. Enter an email address not registered in the system.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: System returns an appropriate error. No email is sent.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Password Reset with Valid Token

TestSteps.Step: 1. Open the reset link from the email.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Password is updated. User can log in successfully with the new password.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Expired Reset Token is Rejected

TestSteps.Step: 1. Open a password reset link that is older than 1 hour.
2. Enter a new password and submit.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: System returns an error: 'Reset link has expired. Please request a new one.'

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Google Sign-In Button Visible

TestSteps.Step: 1. Open the login or register page.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Google Sign-In button is visible on both login and register pages.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Successful Google OAuth Login

TestSteps.Step: 2. Select a valid Google account from the popup.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: User is authenticated and redirected to the appropriate dashboard. JWT token stored in localStorage.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Vehicle List Loads for Manager

TestSteps.Step: 2. Navigate to the Fleet Management page.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: All registered vehicles are listed with number plate, make, model, status, and health score.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Vehicle Filter by Status — Available

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the Fleet Management page, select 'Available' from the status filter.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Only vehicles with status 'available' are shown in the list.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Vehicle Filter by Status — In Use

TestSteps.Step: 1. Select 'In Use' from the status filter.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Only vehicles with status 'in-use' are shown.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Vehicle Filter by Status — Maintenance
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Only vehicles with status 'maintenance' are shown.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Driver Cannot Access Fleet Management

TestSteps.Step: 2. Attempt to navigate to the Fleet Management URL directly.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Access is denied. System returns HTTP 403 or redirects to the driver dashboard.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Add Vehicle Form Opens

TestSteps.Step: 2. Click the 'Add Vehicle' button on the Fleet Management page.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Add Vehicle form is displayed with fields: Number Plate, Make, Model, Year, Color, Type, Notes, Photo.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Add Vehicle with Valid Data

TestSteps.Step: 1. Fill in all required fields with valid data.

TestCase.TestData: Number Plate: CAA-1234, Make: Toyota, Model: KDH, Year: 2022, Type: van
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Vehicle is created. It appears in the Fleet Management list with health score 100 and status 'available'.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Duplicate Number Plate is Rejected

TestSteps.Step: 1. Enter a number plate that already exists in the system.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: System returns HTTP 409. Error message: 'A vehicle with this number plate already exists.'

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Add Vehicle with Missing Required Fields

TestSteps.Step: 1. Leave the Number Plate field empty.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Validation error shown. Form does not submit.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Vehicle Details Can Be Updated

TestSteps.Step: 1. Click on a vehicle in the Fleet Management list.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Vehicle record is updated. Changes are reflected in the vehicle detail view.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Vehicle Status Can Be Changed to Maintenance

TestSteps.Step: 1. Open a vehicle that is currently 'available'.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Vehicle status updated to 'maintenance'. Vehicle no longer appears in smart assignment results.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Driver Can Start a New Inspection
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Inspection record is created with status 'in_progress'. Driver proceeds to customer details step.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Customer Details Are Saved

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the Customer Details step, enter customer name, NIC, phone, rental start, and rental end.

TestCase.TestData: Customer Name: Amal Fernando, NIC: 199012345678, Phone: +94771234567, Rental: 2026-03-20 to 2026-03-25
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Customer details are saved. Driver proceeds to the photo capture step.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify All 8 Photos Can Be Captured

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the Photo Capture step, capture photos for all 8 angles: front, rear, left, right, interior, dashboard, damage, odometer.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: All 8 photos are uploaded and visible in the photo review step.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify AI Damage Detection Runs on Photos

TestSteps.Step: 1. After photo review, proceed to the AI Processing step.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: AI analysis completes. Damage detection results are displayed with damage type, severity, and confidence score per photo.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify AI Service Returns STUB_MODE When Model Unavailable

TestSteps.Step: 1. Simulate AI service running in STUB_MODE (model weights missing).
2. Trigger AI analysis from the inspection workflow.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: AI service returns HTTP 200 with mock damage detections and stub_mode: true in the response. Workflow continues without error.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Digital Signatures Can Be Captured

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the Digital Signatures step, draw a signature in the driver signature pad.
2. Draw a signature in the customer signature pad.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Both signatures are saved as PNG files. Inspection proceeds to report generation.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify PDF Report Is Generated

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the Report Generated step, click 'Download PDF'.

TestCase.TestData: Completed inspection with photos, AI results, and signatures
TestCase.ExpectedResult: PDF downloads successfully. Report contains: customer name, NIC, vehicle details, inspection date, damage summary, and both signatures.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Inspection Is Marked Complete

TestSteps.Step: 1. Complete all 8 steps of the inspection workflow.
2. Check the inspection status in the driver's inspection history.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Inspection status is 'completed'. Record visible in driver inspection history and manager inspection list.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Manager Can View All Inspections
TestCase.ExpectedResult: All inspections from all drivers are listed with status, vehicle plate, driver name, and date.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Manager Can Approve an Inspection
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Inspection status updates to 'reviewed'. Review record created with status 'approved'. Notification sent to driver.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Manager Can Flag an Inspection
TestCase.TestData: Completed inspection, review_status: flagged, notes: Undisclosed damage found
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Inspection review status is 'flagged'. Notes saved. Driver receives a notification.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Driver Cannot Review Inspections
TestCase.ExpectedResult: System returns HTTP 403 Forbidden. Driver cannot submit reviews.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Driver Sees Only Their Own Inspections
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Only inspections conducted by driver1 are shown. Inspections from other drivers are not visible.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Inspection Detail View Shows All Information

TestSteps.Step: 1. Click on an inspection in the history list.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Inspection detail page shows: vehicle info, customer details, all 8 photos, damage detection results, signatures, and review status.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Notifications Page Loads
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Notifications page loads and displays all notifications for the logged-in user with message, type, and timestamp.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Unread Notification Badge Count

TestSteps.Step: 1. Log in as a user with unread notifications.
2. Observe the notification badge in the navigation bar.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Notification badge displays the correct count of unread notifications.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Notification Is Marked as Read

TestSteps.Step: 2. Click on an unread notification or click 'Mark as Read'.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Notification is marked as read. is_read field updates to true. Unread badge count decrements.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Notification Generated After Inspection Review

TestSteps.Step: 1. Log in as manager and approve an inspection.
2. Log in as the driver who conducted the inspection.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Driver receives a notification about the inspection review outcome.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Notification Generated After High Severity Damage Detection

TestSteps.Step: 1. Complete an inspection where AI detects high severity damage.
2. Log in as manager and check the Notifications page.

TestCase.TestData: Inspection with high severity damage detection
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Manager receives a damage alert notification for the high-severity detection.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify User Sees Only Their Own Notifications
TestCase.ExpectedResult: Only notifications belonging to driver1 are returned. Notifications for other users are not visible.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 401 Returned When No Token Provided

TestSteps.Step: 1. Send a GET request to /api/auth/me without any Authorization header.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 401 Unauthorized. Response body: { "error": "No token provided" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 401 Returned for Expired JWT Token

TestSteps.Step: 1. Use a JWT token that has passed its 8-hour expiry.
2. Send a request to a protected endpoint.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 401 Unauthorized. Response body: { "error": "Token expired" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 401 Returned for Malformed JWT Token

TestSteps.Step: 1. Send a request with Authorization: Bearer invalidtoken123.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 401 Unauthorized. Response body: { "error": "Invalid token" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 403 Returned When Driver Accesses Manager Route

TestSteps.Step: 2. Send a GET request to /api/manager/dashboard/stats with the driver JWT.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 403 Forbidden. Response body: { "error": "Insufficient role" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 404 Returned for Non-Existent Inspection
TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 404 Not Found. Response body: { "error": "Inspection not found" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 404 Returned for Non-Existent Vehicle
TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 404 Not Found. Response body: { "error": "Vehicle not found" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 409 Returned for Duplicate Email Registration

TestSteps.Step: 1. Register a user with email test@example.com.
2. Attempt to register again with the same email.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 409 Conflict. Response body: { "error": "Email address already registered" }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 400 Returned When Non-Image File Uploaded as Photo

TestSteps.Step: 2. Attempt to upload a PDF file as a vehicle inspection photo via POST /api/photos/upload/:id.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 400 Bad Request. Response body: { "error": "Invalid file type. Only JPEG and PNG accepted." }

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 413 Returned When File Upload Exceeds Size Limit

TestSteps.Step: 1. Attempt to upload a photo larger than 10 MB to the photo upload endpoint.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 413 Payload Too Large. Error message returned. File is not saved to disk.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify 503 Returned When AI Service Is Unreachable
TestCase.TestData: Stopped AI service, Valid inspection ID
TestCase.ExpectedResult: HTTP 503 Service Unavailable. Response body: { "error": "AI service unavailable" }. Application does not crash.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify SQL Injection is Prevented in Login Email Field

TestSteps.Step: 1. Enter a SQL injection string in the email field: ' OR 1=1 --

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Login fails with HTTP 401. Database query is parameterised; no SQL injection executed.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Password Minimum Requirements Are Enforced

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the register page, enter a password of only 4 characters with no uppercase or symbols.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Validation error displayed. Registration does not proceed. Password must be at least 8 characters.

TestCase.TestCaseName: Verify Invalid Date Range in Inspection Customer Details

TestSteps.Step: 1. On the Customer Details step, enter a rental_end date that is earlier than rental_start.

TestCase.ExpectedResult: Validation error displayed. Inspection does not proceed past the customer details step.
